There may be spiders in the Bindbole Wood, north and north-west of Overhill. Otho Broadbelt sent you to speak with Robin Smallburrow about the spiders…
Robin Smallburrow can be found in the Ivy Bush in the centre of Hobbiton. Shirriff Smallburrow sent you to deal with the spider threat in Bindbole Woo…
